name: webflow-migrate-skill
description: Migrate a Webflow-hosted site to a self-hosted static site without paying for an export

plugins.name: webflow-migrate
plugins.description: Migrate a Webflow-hosted site to a self-hosted static site. Use when the user wants to export, migrate, or move a site off Webflow without paying for an export, self-host a Webflow site, or transition from Webflow to another hosting provider like Render, Netlify, or Vercel.
